hooks.command: if [ -f vendor/bin/phpstan ]; then vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --no-progress --memory-limit=512M 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
if [ -f vendor/bin/pint ]; then vendor/bin/pint --dirty 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
if [ -f vendor/bin/pest ]; then vendor/bin/pest --no-coverage 2>&1; elif [ -f vendor/bin/phpunit ]; then vendor/bin/phpunit 2>&1; fi
